Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - FC Lausanne-Sport
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - SK Rapid Wien
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - AC Sparta Prague
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - KuPS Kuopio
programme.desc: At the halfway point of the regular phase of the Conference League, Pride of Podlasie is in thirteenth place, which guarantees seeding in the play-off phase.Adrian Siemieniec's players remain undefeated, but they cannot be proud of their last performance.They only drew 1-1 with Macedonian Shkendija and scored the equalizing goal in the tenth minute of added time.Jagiellonia has a match against KuPS Kuopio, which, like itself, has five points.The Finnish team will take the field in Białystok encouraged by their 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the previous round.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase of the competition.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - semi-final match: SC Braga - SC Freiburg
programme.desc: Both SC Freiburg and SC Braga will enter the semi-final of the Europa League in not the best form.The Germans were eliminated from the domestic cup, and in the last league match they lost 0:4 to Borussia Dortmund.The Portuguese, in turn, lost to Santa Clara 1-2 in the previous round.The team from Freiburg im Breisgau eliminated Celta Vigo in the quarterfinals, winning both games 3-1 and 3-0.The team from Braga turned out to be better than Real Betis.First, he drew at home 1:1, and then won sensationally away 4:2.

programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Brazil - Egypt
programme.desc: At the end of May, the Brazilians showed their offensive power in a friendly match against Panama, defeating their opponents 6:2.The Egyptians also rejoiced in their victory.They won 1-0 against the Russian national team.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Bolivia - Scotland
programme.desc: During the World Championships, the Scottish team will compete in a group including:with Morocco.The sparring with Bolivia is intended to familiarize the players with the South American style of play and give them a sample of what awaits them with Canarinhos.

programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Argentina - Honduras
programme.desc: The world champions played two sparring matches this year.In the first match they were better than Mauritania, in the second match they beat Zambia.They will now face Honduras, ranked 66th in the FIFA rankings.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Morocco - Norway
Football - friendly match: Argentina - Iceland
programme.desc: The Argentines will finish their preparations for the tournament in North America with a competition against the Icelanders.The current world champions have faced them once.Then, during the 2018 World Cup, they drew with them 1:1.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Brazil - Egypt
programme.desc: At the end of May, the Brazilians showed their offensive power in a friendly match against Panama, defeating their opponents 6:2.The Egyptians also rejoiced in their victory.They won 1-0 against the Russian national team.

Men's volleyball: Champions League - semi-final match: PGE Projekt Warszawa - Sir Sicoma Monini Perugia
programme.desc: This year, for the first time in history, Projekt from Warsaw was among the best teams on the Old Continent.The path of the capital team to the final tournament of the Champions League was not strewn with roses.Promotion to the play-off phase by a shot, then the golden set against Itas Trentino and the fierce competition against Bogdanka LUK Lublin in the quarterfinals showed that volleyball players from the capital do not give up in the most difficult moments.They will fight for promotion to the grand final against the defender of the trophy, Sir Sicoma Monini Perugia, whose important player is the Polish representative, Kamil Semeniuk.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.
